narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp F (precinct in Warren County) has 861 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
